clusters.cluster_id: root_cause::All QA pipeline stages (normalization, extraction, validation) executed successf::fulfilled
clusters.mechanism: All QA pipeline stages (normalization, extraction, validation) executed successf::fulfilled
expectation_ids: 提供每次赔付金额比例范围
说明存在次数上限和间隔期要求
提醒以保险合同条款为准
告知轻症分组限制和合同继续有效等关键规则
答案内容准确无错误信息
clusters.common_root_cause: All QA pipeline stages (normalization, extraction, validation) executed successfully and required evidence is present. The actual answer accurately covers the main query but fails to include secondary yet critical details like grouping restrictions, contract continuance, and cumulative payout limits that are present in the reference answer. The root cause lies in the answer generation/provided output stage, which likely produced a concise answer that omitted these constraints, resulting in incomplete fulfillment of expectation “告知轻症分组限制和合同继续有效等关键规则”.

evidence.text: 一般情况下，轻症可以赔付多次
每次赔付金额通常为基本保险金额的20%至30%
可能有次数上限（如3次或5次）和间隔期要求
建议查阅您的保险合同条款获取准确信息
轻症责任可能设有分组限制，即同一组别的轻症只能赔付一次；另外，轻症赔付后合同继续有效，但累计赔付上限可能有限制
